creator: f.mueller@gmx.de
text:
It seems like this issue is making no progress. We have a stalemate at this point. As previously reported, Android only supports UDP encapsulation for IPV6, but FreeBSD currently does not.

As a result, it is not possible to establish IPsec Roadwarrior connections from Android to FreeBSD over IPv6. Implementing UDP encapsulation would solve this problem.
